title: Dusted Milk Bottles 500 gram Bag (1/2 Kilo)
features: Ingredients: glucose syrup, sugar, full cream sweetened condensed milk, modified maize starch, beef gelatine, flavourings, salt
description: Product description These have the best chew a gum coud possibly have. Similar to the gone, but not forgotten Milk Teeth, these have a milky flavour with a light powdery dusting. Ingredients Ingredients: glucose syrup, sugar, full cream sweetened condensed milk, modified maize starch, beef gelatine, flavourings, salt Directions Open the bag carefully to avoid spilling the contents. These candies are chewy and may pose a choking hazard, especially for young children. They contain beef gelatine, which may not be suitable for vegetarians or vegans. Enjoy responsibly.
